textByHash.24cd7993943f73e36605ea112699178480f3e256: They won't ignore me for much longer!
textByHash.df863c19810eb3f508d035ac86cda4300da5a1b4: When I have demonic powers, they'll all have to pay attention to me!
textByHash.13fe80e71f1111080a2312f2cf82b2471556a913: And SHE won't ignore me then. I'll be able to show her how I feel.
textByHash.d5fe8f247429b1588022c6706c5237b93b7043e2: I will make everyone like me!
textByHash.1529a5f408f0be131657e38648c9d388cd90e6fd: No. I gave it to Matthew.
textByHash.bcdc3d9b6792e62a4777abcf9990e16937dfc1f3: He went away and left us. He probably didn't like me.
textByHash.c7ba94a0f9ff97dfa12e00884f9794e189231e7a: What? I'm a beggar. Do I look as if I have any money? Look, take everything I own why don't you?
textByHash.f5a61fde3ac31b2ab22ad7693eef737bdd7ebf68: You ask me for tax but your bag is so full of stuff you can't even hold the pittance that is the whole of my belongings! Go away and leave me to beg in peace.
textByHash.e044798c5af4700d0652f2d0468ebdf5480b26b5: Spare us a few coppers mister
textByHash.84291abb842df4fbfce98db5103858b187138c08: Spare us a few coppers miss
